description_long: This is a modern, boxy bungalow with a flat roof and a striking red and white color scheme. The structure features two prominent rectangular volumes on either side, separated by a recessed central section that likely serves as the main entrance. Large windows are distributed across the facade, providing ample natural light and a contemporary aesthetic. The building sits on a rectangular plot with a driveway or walkway leading up to it, and is surrounded by a few stylized trees and shrubs. The roof appears to be flat and dark, contrasting with the lighter walls and accentuating the geometric design. The overall appearance is clean, minimalistic, and well-suited for an urban neighborhood.
description: A modern, flat-roofed red and white bungalow with large windows and a geometric, boxy design, surrounded by stylized trees.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, two prominent box-like volumes, and a driveway or walkway with trees on either side.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the building, the flat roof, and the arrangement of windows along the side facade.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back facade, symmetrical box volumes, and the flat roof, with trees positioned around the plot.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the other side of the bungalow, window placement, and the continuation of the flat roof.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large front and side windows
